summary: KOLO PWA Frontend Testing Complete - All 8 requested features verified working via Playwright testing
passed_tests: Today view displays 4 overdue tasks correctly for test@test.com (Jean Dupont - SMS, Call, Email, Visit)
All Tasks view shows completed task 'Appel terminĂ© test' in green with checkmark icon
Completed task has green left border (3px solid rgb(34, 197, 94))
Completed task has line-through text decoration on title div
Completed task shows '(Done)' label in green
Completed task does NOT appear in Today view (verified: Today shows 4 tasks, All Tasks shows 5)
Swipe background is NOT present for completed tasks (hasSwipeBackground: false)
Swipe background IS present for non-completed tasks (hasSwipeBackground: true)
Mini-dashboard shows correct stats: 0/4 Done, 1 Prospects, 4 To do
Task cards display correct type icons: SMS, Call, Email, Visit
Navigation bar shows 'Today' and 'Prospects' labels at bottom with icons
FAB button (purple +) opens New prospect form correctly

overdue_tasks_in_today.details: Today view correctly displays 4 overdue non-completed tasks with yellow '(Overdue)' label

completed_tasks_green_styling.details: Completed task 'Appel terminĂ© test' displays with: green checkmark icon, green text color rgb(34, 197, 94), green left border 3px solid, opacity 0.7, line-through text decoration, '(Done)' label in green

completed_tasks_not_in_today.details: Today view shows exactly 4 tasks (non-completed overdue). Completed task only appears in All Tasks view

swipe_disabled_for_completed.details: Swipe background element is conditionally rendered - present for non-completed tasks, absent for completed tasks. Touch handlers are set to undefined for completed tasks

mini_dashboard_stats.details: Dashboard shows 0/4 Done, 1 Prospects, 4 To do - correctly reflecting current data state

segment_control.details: Today/All tasks segment buttons work correctly with proper purple accent styling on active segment

task_type_icons.details: Each task displays correct icon: SMSâ†’MessageSquare, Callâ†’Phone, Emailâ†’Mail, Visitâ†’Home

navigation_bar.details: Bottom navigation shows Today and Prospects tabs with labels under icons. FAB button in center opens Add Prospect form

critical_code_review_comments: All 8 requested features implemented correctly in AppShell.js
Completed task styling uses conditional rendering with isCompleted flag
Swipe handlers conditionally applied: onTouchStart/Move/End = undefined for completed tasks
Green styling uses CSS variables: var(--success) = rgb(34, 197, 94)
Task filtering correctly separates completed vs non-completed in Today vs All Tasks views

seed_data_context.test_user_tasks: 4 overdue non-completed tasks (Jean Dupont - SMS, Call, Email, Visit) + 1 completed task (Appel terminĂ© test)
